examples: When playing against underspin strokes like push, I have felt it is good to loop as soon as the ball rises.
Solution: to impart underspin, you must swing high to low, but when players chop down too severely and finish low, their shot hits the net.
To hit a good drop shot one needs a good slice or underspin shot. A drop shot is really nothing more than an underspin shot that lands short or close to the net.
